_note: Sample evidence fixture — not real sourced content. Used for local/demo mode only.

cards.title: Fed officials signal patience on rate cuts after strong payrolls
cards.author: Financial Reporter
cards.summary_raw: Multiple Fed officials reiterated a data-dependent stance following the April payrolls beat. No urgency to cut in the near term. Market-implied cuts pushed out.
cards.thesis: Fed officials indicate no rush to cut rates following strong employment data
cards.evidence: Multiple Fed speeches citing data dependence; payrolls beat consensus; market rate expectations adjusted
cards.macro_relevance: US monetary policy path signals persistence of higher-for-longer regime, validating structural inflation concerns
cards.portfolio_relevance: Higher rates support short duration positioning; validates fiscal dominance thesis underlying duration hedge

cards.title: Ukraine grain export deal uncertainty creates food security concerns
cards.author: Agricultural Correspondent
cards.summary_raw: Ongoing geopolitical tensions threaten grain export corridors from major agricultural regions. Weather disruptions in key growing areas compound supply concerns.
cards.thesis: Structural food security risks emerging from geopolitical and climate disruptions
cards.evidence: Export corridor disruptions, weather damage to crops, rising fertilizer costs, supply chain bottlenecks
cards.macro_relevance: Food inflation drives broader price pressures and social stability concerns in emerging markets
cards.portfolio_relevance: Validates food security theme in grains complex allocation; supports structural agriculture positioning

cards.title: Metals complex gains momentum on green transition demand
cards.author: Research Analyst
cards.summary_raw: Research note highlights accelerating demand for gold, silver, and copper driven by monetary debasement concerns and industrial demand. Central bank buying continues at elevated pace.
cards.thesis: Metals complex benefits from monetary debasement hedge and industrial demand drivers
cards.evidence: Central bank gold purchases, silver industrial demand data, copper infrastructure demand, monetary debasement metrics
cards.macro_relevance: Metals complex reflects monetary debasement hedge and structural industrial demand growth
cards.portfolio_relevance: Supports metals complex allocation (gold/silver/copper); validates monetary debasement protection strategy

cards.title: Central banks accelerate de-dollarization efforts amid fiscal concerns
cards.author: Economic Correspondent
cards.summary_raw: Multiple central banks announce plans to diversify reserves away from USD-denominated assets. Concerns over US fiscal trajectory drive currency diversification initiatives.
cards.thesis: Structural shift away from USD dominance accelerating among major central banks
cards.evidence: Central bank reserve composition changes, bilateral trade currency agreements, fiscal sustainability metrics
cards.macro_relevance: USD reserve currency status faces long-term structural challenges from fiscal dynamics
cards.portfolio_relevance: Supports currency diversification strategy; validates concerns about USD concentration risk
